title: Srimp
body:
# SRIMP (REAL)

this is just a mod I made cause I thought it'd be funny

it adds a srimp mob, and not really much else (though it does have some funny though temporary additions, like the srimp tools and armor. the srimp item itself is staying, though the blocks probably won't)

HOWEVER I do have plans for the mod (which I don't think are too outlandish?)

## plans
- a way to get srimp in survival mode
- a way to breed srimp
- either an integration with Farmer's Delight for srimp fried rice, or my own rice and cooking method
- more actual reason to seek out srimp (the armor and tools are temporary and not likely to be in the final game)

other than that, have fun hearing funny srimp noises
